Patient presents with:

Ear pain: Per dad pt already has 2 ear infection in the past and was given antibiotic per dad pt is still
pulling ears, BF
Immunization: Mmmr,varicella and Hep A, if pt is doing well and if okay with the provider.BF
HPI: Patient has been coughing for the past 2 days along with runny nose. He vomited once last night
after finishing a bottle of milk before going to sleep. No blood in vomit. No diarrhea. Denies fever. Patient
consistently tugs on his ears and has history of recurrent ear infections.
Patient has had 4 episodes of recurrent bilateral/right otitis media:
7/15/2025: tx with Augmentin
7/26/2025: tx with Augmentin (Urgent care- thought that previous tx was with Amoxicillin, but it was
Augmentin)
10/08/2025 : tx with Amoxcillin (right AOM)
11/12/2025 (today): tx with Cefdinir

claude_vision.referral_reason: Referral to ENT (Otolaryngology) for recurrent acute suppurative otitis media (bilateral), evaluation for possible PE (pressure equalization) tube placement. Patient has had 4 episodes of recurrent bilateral/right otitis media within approximately 4 months.
relevant_clinical_findings: 4 episodes of recurrent bilateral/right otitis media within ~4 months: 7/15/2025 (Augmentin), 7/26/2025 (Augmentin - urgent care), 10/08/2025 (Amoxicillin - right AOM), 11/12/2025 (Cefdinir - current)
Physical exam 11/12/2025: Bilateral TM with erythema and purulent effusion bilaterally
Nasal congestion with copious clear rhinorrhea noted on exam
Patient consistently tugs on ears - parent-reported ear pulling behavior
Current symptoms: cough x2 days, runny nose x1 day, vomiting started day prior to visit, ear pain
Weight: 10.8 kg (23 lb 13 oz) - pediatric patient
Current treatment: Cefdinir 250mg/5mL, 1.6 mL PO BID x 10 days (started 11/12/2025)
Hearing test required prior to or at ENT visit - two audiometry booths requested
ENT visit completed 2/10/2026 with Keaton, Evelyn Legaspi, NP (New Patient/Consultation - status: Completed)
Hearing Evaluation/Test completed 2/10/2026 with Nunez, Catherine Noel, AUD (status: Completed)
missing_information: Audiogram/hearing test results from 2/10/2026 visit not included in referral packet
ENT consultation note from 2/10/2026 visit with Keaton, Evelyn Legaspi, NP not included
Patient name and date of birth are redacted/illegible on demographics page
Referring physician listed as 'Saied, Rahat, MD' in reason for visit but referral was entered by Garello, Morgan Drew, NP - no direct contact information for either provider included
Insurance/authorization details partially visible but subscriber name, subscriber ID, and issue date fields appear blank or redacted on eligibility verification page
3 remaining authorized visits (4 authorized, 1 completed, 0 currently scheduled) - disposition/plan from completed ENT visit unknown without consultation note
No documentation of failed/passed hearing screen prior to referral
Nystatin oral suspension listed on medication list (started 9/25/2024) - no associated diagnosis documented in this referral packet
claude_vision.summary: This is a pediatric patient referred to Sacramento Ear, Nose & Throat for recurrent acute suppurative otitis media (bilateral), having experienced 4 episodes within approximately 4 months (July–November 2025), each requiring antibiotic treatment, with evaluation for possible PE tube placement. The initial ENT consultation and hearing evaluation were both completed on 2/10/2026; however, the consultation note and audiogram results are not included in this packet, leaving the current plan and disposition unknown. Three of the four authorized visits remain available, and a follow-up or review of the completed visit documentation is needed to determine next steps.
